5.11.25.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee v5.11.25 introduces enhanced forum integration, user expectations documentation, and improved device management with 138 drivers and 5182 fingerprints.

5.11.24.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee v5.11.24 introduces core fixes, enhanced automation, and updated device fingerprints, ensuring improved performance and reliability.

5.11.23.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee v5.11.23 introduces bug fixes, workflow improvements, and enhanced forum responsiveness, ensuring a more reliable smart home experience.

5.11.22.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee v5.11.22 introduces enhanced forum responsiveness, improved workflow resilience, and updates to diagnostics and automation processes.

5.11.21.en: v5.11.21: IR Blaster learning fix, energy divisors, soil moisture fix. (1) IR Blaster ZS06 manual cluster fallback for learning mode. (2) TS011F _TZ3210_xzhnra8x configurable ZCL energy divisors. (3) _TZ3000_dd8wwzcy added. (4) Soil sensor moisture fix in AdaptiveDataParser. (5) TuyaEF00Manager skip auto-convert for divisor:1 DPs.

5.11.19.en: v5.11.19: Soil sensor compound frame guards, curtain motor physical button fix, CI/CD overhaul with auto-publish.

5.11.14.en: v5.11.14: WiFi overhaul + bug fixes. (1) Fix settings blank spinner (Homey.ready). (2) New Easy Login: email+password only WiFi pairing. (3) Redesigned 4-tab configure.html for all 22 WiFi drivers. (4) Fix TS0002 _TZ3000_cauq1okq 2-gang=1. (5) Fix TS0203 _TZ3000_okohwwap → contact_sensor. (6) Fix radar DP4 distance/humidity confusion. (7) TuyaCloudAPI improvements.

5.11.13.en: v5.11.13: Fix presence_sensor_radar log spam (~52K lines/day). (1) Same-value dedup for lux — skip when value unchanged (was logging 0→0 every 5s). (2) Fix lux change calc when currentLux=0: was always returning 100% change, bypassing smoothing filter. (3) Throttle 'static mapping' log to first occurrence per DP. (4) Remove verbose per-event [RADAR-BATTERY] log from Tuya DP listener. Diagnostic report: hcaron@synchrone.fr v5.11.5.

5.11.12.en: v5.11.12: Critical case-sensitivity fix + WiFi bugs. (1) Fixed 5,004 lowercase manufacturer names (_tz3000_ -> _TZ3000_, _tyzb01_ -> _TYZB01_, _tyst11_ -> _TYST11_) — devices were not matching due to case-sensitive Homey matching (GH#124). (2) Fixed _TZE200_t1blo2bj misclassified as thermostat instead of siren. (3) WiFi: Fixed double DP listener in wifi_generic causing duplicate processing. (4) WiFi: Fixed memory leak on settings change (client not nulled after destroy). (5) WiFi: Fixed UDP discovery race condition (late device-found listener). (6) WiFi: Fixed manual pairing error callback in all 22 WiFi drivers.

5.11.11.en: v5.11.11: Fingerprint regression fixes — (1) Removed 5,450 case-duplicate mfrs across 113 drivers. (2) Fixed plug_smart vs plug_energy_monitor TS011F collision (82 overlapping mfrs removed). (3) Fixed BSEED switch_3gang vs wall_switch_3gang_1way collision. (4) Fixed Excellux PID collision across contact/motion/climate sensors (129 mfrs affected). (5) Fixed button_wireless_4 wrong PID TS0041 + 6 mfrs. Cross-driver collisions reduced from 200+ to 74 (all acceptable). See docs/REGRESSION_ANALYSIS_v5.11.md.

5.11.10.en: v5.11.10: Full Zigbee DB sync — crawled Z2M (365 files), ZHA (all quirks), Blakadder, deCONZ. +117 new fingerprints across 19 drivers: switch_1gang +20, bulb_rgbw +13, plug_smart +11, dimmer_wall_1gang +11, climate_sensor +11, radiator_valve +8, presence_sensor_radar +7, bulb_dimmable +5, switch_3gang +5, water_leak_sensor +5, lock_smart +4, switch_2gang +4, contact_sensor +2, switch_4gang +3, motion_sensor +3, energy_meter_3phase +2, ir_blaster +1, siren +1, water_valve_garden +1. New PIDs: TS000F, TS1002, FE-GU10-5W, SMD9300.

5.11.9.en: v5.11.9: Live DB sync — Z2M+ZHA+deCONZ crawl. +2 water_leak_sensor (TS0207), +6 radiator_valve TRVs (_TYST11_).

5.11.8.en: v5.11.8: Z2M fingerprint sync — Added 18 new device fingerprints. climate_sensor: +5 (_TZE204_3q3maeoo, _TZE204_6vwfjkcj, _TZE204_tuhfx7tf, _TZE284_q22avxbv, _TZE284_roujjevx). switch_4gang: +4 TS0726 (_TZ300A_ohjmifiz, _TZ300A_rncj86af, _TZ300A_vkflnsl0, _TZ300A_vqrs45nj). water_tank_monitor: +1 (_TZE284_mxujdmxo). plug_smart: +1 (_TZ3210_sgb0xhwn). JohanBendz forks crawled — no additional fingerprints found beyond upstream.

5.11.7.en: v5.11.7: New driver — Wall Switch 4-Gang 1-Way (BSEED). Adds support for BSEED 4-gang ZCL glass touch switches (TS0004/TS0014). Sub-device architecture: each gang = separate Homey device card. Includes scene mode (auto/magic/both), LED indicator control, and physical button flow triggers for all 4 gangs.

5.11.6.en: v5.11.6: BSEED glass switch & scene switch fingerprint fixes — (1) Removed BSEED ZCL-only fingerprint _TZ3000_blhvsaqf from DP-based switch_1gang driver — caused wrong driver match showing duplicate pairing options. (2) Removed _TZ3000_vp6clf9d (TS0044 4-button scene switch) from switch_1gang/2gang/3gang/4gang — only belongs in button_wireless_4. (3) Added 7 BSEED ZCL fingerprints to wall_switch_3gang_1way (TS0003) for proper 3-gang glass switch support.
